stories.name: Look into task pickup and handoff
stories.description: Investigate the full task pickup and handoff flow end-to-end in the SDLC Framework SDLC pipeline. Trace how an agent picks up a task, transitions phases, and hands off to the next role (reviewer, devops). Identify any gaps or friction in the current contract.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Can trace a task from assign through handoff in the dashboard - Phase contracts are clearly documented - Any gaps are filed as follow-up stories
stories.frontend: Verify dashboard shows handoff state correctly (stepPauseReady, handoffDispatched)
stories.backend: Trace scheduler → handoff → pr-events route chain. Check that local stories flow the same as Agility stories.

stories.name: Unit tests for agent-runner registry and tools
stories.description: Add unit test coverage for agent-runner/registry.ts (runner lifecycle, inject, stop) and agent-runner/tools.ts (path safety, read/write/list). Currently zero coverage.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - registry.ts: lifecycle start/stop, inject, concurrent runner guard - tools.ts: path safety (no traversal), read/write/list happy path and error cases - All new tests pass in vitest run
stories.backend: Write tests in src/test/. Use existing vitest + jsdom setup.

stories.name: SSE chat route unit test coverage
stories.description: The SSE stream for chat is only covered by Cypress today. Add unit-level tests for the chat SSE route so regressions are caught without spinning up a browser.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Unit tests for chat SSE route: connection, message delivery, disconnect cleanup - Tests run in vitest (no Cypress required)
stories.backend: Mirror the pattern from src/test/statusEvents.test.ts for the chat SSE route.

stories.name: Server hook-runner on status file changes
stories.description: Add src/server/hook-runner.ts subscribed to onStatusChange so watcher logic runs in the SDLC Framework server when status files change. Debounce like status-events.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Status writes trigger hook-runner - Idempotent per agent+phase - Unit tests for debounce - Started on server boot

stories.name: Port workflow-validator to hook-runner.ts
stories.description: Port all checks from workflow-validator.ps1 to TypeScript with parity for task, reviewer handoff, PR, and Agility task violations.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Four validator checks ported - Vitest per violation type - Actionable nudge messages

stories.name: Port reviewer and devops watcher automation to hook-runner
stories.description: Call spawn-from-desk and handoff APIs on status transitions; mirror handoffDispatched guards from PowerShell watchers.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Reviewer and devops automation parity - handoff tests pass - No duplicate POSTs
stories.backend: Use existing handoff routes or in-process calls.

stories.name: Unify role watchers and /api/hook/agent-stop in hook-runner
stories.description: Port frontend/backend/ux nudges and /btw triggers; make agent-stop call the same hook-runner module.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Single TS implementation for IDE and server - agent-stop tests pass

stories.name: Server-driven agent continue (reduce followup_message dependency)
stories.description: Nudge agents via continue/spawn APIs instead of IDE followup_message injection where the scheduler allows.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Auto-continue for key phases - Step-mode respected - No continue loops

stories.name: Thin optional IDE hooks; retire PowerShell watchers
stories.description: Optional hooks POST to server; remove duplicated PowerShell watcher logic after parity.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Quiet optional hooks - Docs updated - PS watchers retired

stories.name: Cloud token estimator via server endpoint
stories.description: Optional POST endpoint for response-text token estimates; minimal afterAgentResponse hook or log-based estimation.
stories.acceptanceCriteria: - Dashboard token ledger still works - No profile noise on token path
